title: D4vd makes unusual request ahead of hearing, judge responds with a twist
summary_full: D4vd faces a crucial court hearing for serious charges including murder. His request to wear formal clothes instead of jail attire was denied by the judge. However, the court did approve a haircut for him before the May 1 hearing. This unusual pre-hearing scenario adds a peculiar twist to the ongoing legal proceedings.
